blocks.text: Liverpool and Barcelona detonate — Champions League goes nuclear
Sørloth's Atlético eliminated Tottenham despite a 3-2 home loss — cold away-goal justice. Sporting crushed Bodø/Glimt 5-0. A complicated Champions League Wednesday for Norwegian football.
♟️ 17:00 — Christiansen opens BTC Chess960 Survival stage in Roatán

blocks.label: ⚽ Weekend Must-Watch
items: Sat 13:30 — Brighton vs Liverpool — Reds 5th and 21pts off Arsenal, no room for a slip
Sun 13:00 — Sunderland vs Newcastle — Tyne-Wear derby, always unpredictable
Sun 14:00 — Barcelona vs Rayo Vallecano — Camp Nou, title charge continues
